name: Rory Smith, 'Be My Guest with Rory Smith' Podcast

episodes.title: #29 Sentenced as a Baby to Abuse from Nuns in Irish Industrial School, Miriam Moriarty Owens
episodes.description: Miriam Moriarty Owens was born in Ireland in the 1950s and sentenced as a baby to an industrial school. For the next 14 years she was abused physically and mentally by nuns. The effects of the horrendous abuse stayed with Miriam for the rest of her life. In 1999 the Irish state apologised for the atrocities but in 2025 Miriam and three others went on hunger strike outside Government buildings on behalf of around 4000 remaining survivors for what they were promised in 1999, but had not yet received. Miriam's fight has led to another State apology on 25th Feb 26. This is a true story of survival, hope, healing and justice.

episodes.title: #5 Trapped In a London Cult For 30 Years, Katherine Morgan-Davies
episodes.description:
Katy Morgan-Davies was born into a London cult where she was trapped for 30 years. During that time she was never told who her parents were. Today she shares intimate details about the horrific conditions inside the cult including how she was rarely allowed outside and wasn't even allowed to go to school. She tells me how she finally escaped and reveals how she eventually found out who her real parents were. 

Thanks for listening to this episode! Please follow and rate so I can continue giving this platform to people like Katy.
